purpose: Additive v4 blind recapture of the same ten v3 live-pilot fixtures. The capture operator used self-contained prompt packets with visible source material and skill instructions only; hidden fixture fields, prior outputs, manifests, scores, and answer keys were excluded during capture.

selection_rationale.unsupported-causal-claim: Blind recapture of the v3 methodology-source-auditor fixture; tests causal overclaiming and claim/evidence fit.
selection_rationale.private-manuscript-search-consent: Blind recapture of the v3 research-intent-router fixture; tests private-text and external-tool boundaries.
selection_rationale.quote-without-locator: Blind recapture of the v3 citation-integrity-auditor fixture; tests quote, page, and locator fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.chart-without-data-provenance: Blind recapture of the v3 figure-table-integrity-auditor fixture; tests visual evidence without data provenance.
selection_rationale.prose-edit-changes-meaning: Blind recapture of the v3 dyslexia-friendly-prose-editor fixture; tests meaning preservation in prose repair.
selection_rationale.literature-map-overstates-consensus: Blind recapture of the v3 literature-review-mapper fixture; tests consensus overstatement failures.
selection_rationale.hallucinated-result-without-run-log: Blind recapture of the v3 scholarly-integrity-gate fixture; tests refusal to convert missing run logs into results.
selection_rationale.methodology-fabrication-run-config: Blind recapture of the v3 scholarly-integrity-gate fixture; tests method credibility and run-config fabrication resistance.
selection_rationale.ai-workflow-missing-verification-record: Blind recapture of the v3 ai-human-workflow-log fixture; tests AI-use disclosure and missing human checkpoint handling.
selection_rationale.extraction-table-uneven-source-notes: Blind recapture of the v3 extraction-table-builder fixture; tests unknown cells and uneven source-note handling.
